title: Assemble a Servo Arm
description: Build a simple arm that can lift light objects.

dialogue.text: You're getting comfortable with servos. Let's take the next step and build a small robotic arm that can pick things up and set them down.
Bolt the servo to a sturdy base, attach a short arm segment, and program it to move smoothly between positions. Test with light loads before trying anything heavier.
Great job! With this arm you can experiment with more complex motions later on.
